final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cozy daily-life illustration of a cat (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 治愈系 (healing/cozy) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include an orange tabby cat (one), fluffy fur texture
Scene/backdrop: must include a windowsill with the cat sunbathing, warm indoor setting; outside the window must be a snowy winter street scene
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, soft, heartwarming atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs warm indoor tones contrasting with cool winter outside — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft, fluffy fur surface treatment — exact rendering style is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
